# Task
Name: prompt/workflow
Title: Workflow prompt task
Branch: prompt/workflow
Directory: .subtask/tasks/prompt--workflow

## Workspace
Your working directory is `/tmp/ws`. This IS your copy of the project — a git worktree of `main` on branch `prompt/workflow`.

- Use paths relative to cwd, or absolute paths under cwd.
- Never use absolute paths to other clones of this project (e.g. `/Users/.../Code/<projectname>`). Edits outside your worktree will not appear on your task branch and will not merge.
- If unsure, run `pwd` and `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` — both should match cwd.

## Description
Do the workflow thing.

## Workflow
When applicable, create PROGRESS.json to track your steps:
```json
[
    {"step": "First step", "done": false},
    {"step": "Second step", "done": false}
]
```
Update `done: true` as you complete each step, or revise as needed. Commit when done.

--------------------

Implement as described.
